attacks.name: Bind
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokemon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Vengeful Spikes
attacks.text: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Omanyte, Omastar, Omastar δ, and Omanyte δ in your discard pile.

tests.name: bind_paralyzes_on_heads
tests.description: Test that Bind paralyzes on heads

tests.name: vengeful_spikes_scales
tests.description: Test that Vengeful Spikes adds +10 per Omanyte/Omastar in discard
